performance_notes: Natural voice with minimal effects baked in
Leave room for Unreal reverb, filtering, and stingers

lines.text: Arthur, exemplary obedience noted. Promotion review is no longer theoretical.
Arthur, compliance trend positive. Continue proving that you can be useful forever.
Arthur, management appreciates how quickly you stopped asking why.
Arthur, the building trusts employees who do not improvise.
Arthur, noncompliance recorded. The weekend is moving further away from you.
Arthur, we can hear you thinking about escape. Please return to task.
Arthur, failure to follow directives will be reflected in your eternity review.
Arthur, insubordination is just panic with paperwork attached.
Arthur, your promotion packet is almost ready. Keep working.
Arthur, the weekend is a privilege tier you have not unlocked.
Arthur, we reviewed your resignation. It was denied retroactively.
Arthur, productivity is how we measure the soul.
Arthur, the Archive says you are improving.
Arthur, your best years are still in this building.
